message:
feat: change default backend from SQLite to Dolt for new projects

bd init now defaults to Dolt backend for new project initializations.
Existing projects with no explicit backend in metadata.json continue
to use SQLite (backward compatible). BEADS_DB env var auto-detects
SQLite since it always points to a .db file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
